arts.ttl: Chelsea to MISS OUT on €100m target due to trophy drought
arts.sum: The 21-year-old is reportedly desperate to stay at Camp Nou and he dreams of winning major trophies with the club, including the Champions League and La Liga. Barcelona midfielder Marc Casado is set to snub transfer interest from Chelsea in order to remain at Camp Nou for the foreseeable future, according to reports in Spain.

arts.ttl: Chelsea contact player’s agents again after summer interest – ‘Asked for months’ about his situation
arts.sum: Chelsea were one of the teams to contact Barcelona youngster Marc Casadó in the January transfer window. That’s according to Cadena SER, who report that Chelsea ‘touched the player’ despite his determination to remain with Barcelona. arts.ttl: Liam Delap sends clear transfer message amid Chelsea striker injury crisis
arts.sum: People around me have told me to stay away from it, it’s something that I’m very good at in focusing on what I want to do. Despite having only just joined, it is difficult to see Delap playing in the Championship next season if Ipswich do get relegated.
